task.title: Install the Python Extension for VS Code

prereq.p: VS Code must be installed before completing this task.

step.cmd: Click the Extensions icon in the left Activity Bar (it looks like four squares).
In the search bar, type Python.
Click the extension published by Microsoft (it is usually the first result) and then click Install.

result.p: The Python extension is installed. VS Code can now recognise Python files and provide syntax highlighting and run buttons.
